document.title: MI97-05516A ASSY COVER-GF_MIDDLE_BLOCK

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval package for DaejinIM part MI97-05516A, ASSY COVER-GF_MIDDLE_BLOCK, used with GF Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports supplier approval and quality control documentation, including BOM, process controls, packing, inspection criteria, inspection results, RoHS applicability, and packaging recyclability declaration.
keyPoints: Material code and SEC Part No. are MI97-05516A for ASSY COVER-GF_MIDDLE_BLOCK.
Model is identified as GF Detector / GF DETECTOR.
E.D DATE and main approval dates are 2022-09-29.
Process Quality Control Plan category is MP.
Inspection report marks RoHS as applicable.
Packaging recyclability self-declaration states judgment grade 우수, while the attached recyclability grading sheet lists packaging final grade 어려움.

concepts.name: Packaging recyclability self-declaration
concepts.evidence: 부품 포장재 재활용 등급 자가 선언서

evidence.claim: The documented part is ASSY COVER-GF_MIDDLE_BLOCK with material code MI97-05516A.
The model associated with the part is GF Detector.
The document identifies Revision 01 and EC History Rev. 00 First Release.
The Process Quality Control Plan category is MP.

evidence.claim: The inspection report identifies RoHS as applicable.
Inspection criteria include dimensions D1 439.6 ± 0.3 and D2 359.2 ± 0.2 as CTF items.
The supplier inspection report records 5 EA delivered, 5 EA inspected, 5 EA accepted, and 0 EA defective.
